PlayerID.description: The player's unique PlayerID as assigned by SportsDataIO. Note: this ID will stay with the player throughout their MLB career

Status.description: Indicates the player's status of being on an Major League Active Roster. Possible values include: Active, 40 Man Active, Non-Roster Invitee, Minors, Inactive, 7 Day Injury List, 10 Day Injury List, 15 Day Injury List, 60 Day Injury List, Restricted List, Paternity List, Bereavement List, Military List

TeamID.description: The team's unique TeamID as assigned by SportsDataIO

PositionCategory.description: The player's position category. Possible values: DH, IF, OF, P, PH, PR

Position.description: The player's position associated with the given game or season. Possible values: 1B; 2B; 3B; C; CF; DH; IF; LF; OF; P; PH; PR; RF; RP; SP; SS

BirthCity.description: The city in which the player was born

BirthState.description: The state in which the player was born. Note: State will be NULL for all countries outside of North America and Australia

BirthCountry.description: The country in which the player was born

GlobalTeamID.description: A globally unique ID for this team. This value is guaranteed to be unique across all sports/leagues

BatHand.description: The player's batting hand. Possible values: R, L, S

ThrowHand.description: The player's throwing hand. Possible values: R, L, S

Weight.description: The weight of the player in pounds (lbs.)
